data.title: EA's Strong Quarter Turns Heads On Wall Street As Analysts Reassess The Road Ahead
data.description: EA's Q4 report exceeded expectations, leading to an increase in stock price by Wall Street analysts. Wedbush raised price target to $210, JPMorgan to $160. EA reported net bookings of $1.8B, adjusted EPS of $1.58, and gave guidance for fiscal 2026 of $7.6B-$8B in net bookings and $7.60-$8.40 in adjusted EPS. JPMorgan predicts Q1 revenue of $1.28B and EPS of $0.15.

data.title: Coinbase Q1 Earnings Preview: Trump Inauguration, Bitcoin Surge And More Items To Watch
data.description: Coinbase Global (NASDAQ:COIN) could show the company's leadership in the cryptocurrency ecosystem with first-quarter financial results after market close Wednesday.

data.title: 80,000 More Americans Filed For Social Security In March Compared With Last Year – What's Driving This Surge?
Datadog Lifts Revenue Outlook, Analysts Still Bark About Margins
data.description: Datadog announced upbeat Q1 revenues amid exciting earnings season. Strong bookings and increased revenue guidance cited.

data.title: IBM's AI Push Takes Center Stage At Think 2025, Goldman Sees Path To Margin Growth
data.description: IBM's Think 2025 event focused on its portfolio of AI solutions for large enterprises. Analyst James Schneider maintains a Buy rating and $270 price target.
